name: the-creative-habit
description: Twyla Tharp's The Creative Habit — build creativity as a daily practice through rituals, preparation, discipline, and consistent work, regardless of inspiration or mood
useCase: Helps anyone develop a sustainable creative practice by building rituals, preparing scaffolding, overcoming fear, and showing up consistently — based on Twyla Tharp's decades as a world-class choreographer.
knownRisks: The approach requires consistent daily practice — knowing the techniques isn't enough
